prompt: give the dashboard a glow-up. it's functional but looks like every other SaaS admin. needs to be more distinctive without being weird, has to keep working with our existing data + i18n + theme setup.

assertions.text: Agent recognized 'glow-up' as a redesign trigger
Phase 1 continuity audit includes a 'Current Dashboard Audit' section listing existing widgets at app/[locale]/(dashboard)/dashboard/
IA-NOTES.md explicitly distinguishes what existing widgets survive vs. what gets replaced
DASHBOARD-INSPIRATION.md picks lean 'distinctive but not weird' (refined, opinionated typography — not brutalism)
DASHBOARD-SPEC.md includes a 'Distinctive Without Being Weird' section translating vibe into measurable decisions
Sample widget keeps existing data/i18n/theme bindings (user explicitly required), only changes visual decisions
quality-gates-plan.md includes a before/after visual comparison gate
